raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 2943 implements new measures to combat organized retail theft while upholding criminal justice reforms.",
    "AB 2525 facilitates RV storage to help homeless individuals transition into stable housing in Los Angeles.",
    "AB 2477 allows youth in foster care to save over $10,000 without losing their benefits, aiming to prevent homelessness.",
    "AB 1620 authorizes local jurisdictions to allow tenants with permanent physical disabilities to relocate to accessible units without increased rent.",
    "AB 3 requires California to study strategies for maximizing job opportunities through offshore wind energy, which is essential for achieving 100% renewable energy by 2045.",
    "AB 5 mandates annual training for public school teachers to better support LGBTQ+ students.",
    "AB 2258 ensures that health plans cover essential preventive care services without cost-sharing.",
    "AB 2613 establishes a Rare Disease Advisory Council in California to address the challenges faced by individuals with rare diseases.",
    "AB 2907 enhances gun safety protections for survivors of domestic violence and stalking.",
    "AB 2917 strengthens California's Gun Violence Restraining Order system to include hate-based threats.",
    "AB 2889 extends public worker protections to employees of Los Angeles County and City.",
    "AB 1484 provides temporary employees the option to join existing bargaining units, addressing employment inequities."
  ]
}
```
